entry.title: New: Resolution 2025-07 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2024-12-18
entry.content:
Authorizing The Mayor Or The Director Of Finance Of The County Of Kaua‘i To Enter Into An Intergovernmental Agreement With The State Of Hawai‘i, Department Of Health For A Loan From The State Water Pollution Control Revolving Fund For The Wailua Sewer Collection System Inspection, Project No. C150055-13

Latest action: On agenda 2024-12-18

View on the council site
